title: Avoid nested switch statements
description: Nested switch statements are difficult to understand because cases of inner switches can be confused with cases of outer switches. This creates cognitive overhead and makes code maintenance more challenging.
recommendation: Extract inner switch logic into separate functions to improve readability.

noncompliant.description: Deeply nested switch statements are hard to read and maintain, with confusing case relationships.

compliant.description: Extracting nested switch logic into separate functions improves readability and maintainability.

checks.message: Avoid nested switch statements - use polymorphism or separate functions
